s.label: S fricative
s.procrustean_note: Parallel formant law forced into serial cascade via extreme unit-circle zero-forcing. Creates shattering/folding HF character instead of true turbulent noise.

sh.label: SH fricative
sh.procrustean_note: Broad mid-high parallel addition faked by tightly packed poles with interleaved zeros. The cascade cannot sum — it multiplies, creating comb-like artifacts.

p.label: P plosive burst
p.procrustean_note: Flat broadband burst approximated by wide-bandwidth poles spread across the spectrum. The bypass path (AB=63dB) cannot exist in serial cascade — faked by near-unity gain stages.

t.label: T plosive burst
t.procrustean_note: High-peaking transient body. Serial cascade produces the rising HF energy correctly but cannot reproduce the true time-domain burst envelope.

oboe.label: Oboe body
oboe.procrustean_note: Honest cascaded pole-pair. Reedy nasal character maps directly to the DF2T topology.

clarinet.label: Clarinet body
clarinet.procrustean_note: Honest cascaded pole-pair. Hollow woody character with widely separated formants.

bassoon.label: Bassoon body
bassoon.procrustean_note: Honest cascaded pole-pair. Low-mid nasal resonance maps directly.

trumpet.label: Trumpet body
trumpet.procrustean_note: Honest cascaded pole-pair. Brassy projection lives in the bite/presence range.

french_horn.label: French horn body
french_horn.procrustean_note: Single-formant body. Dark mellow brass — one low-mid pole, attenuated highs.

flute.label: Flute body
flute.procrustean_note: Single-formant body. Pure hollow wind resonance at one mid-frequency.

moog_uncompensated.label: Moog LPF (no bass comp)
moog_uncompensated.procrustean_note: No feedback loop in serial cascade. Faked by coupling a resonant pole at fc with a low-frequency zero that chokes bass as Q rises — mimics the Moog's phase-cancellation bass loss.

moog_bass_compensated.label: Moog LPF (bass boost)
moog_bass_compensated.procrustean_note: Bass compensation in hardware is pre-loop input gain. In serial cascade, achieved by a low-frequency pole with increased weight that counteracts the zero-forcing bass choke.

moog_self_oscillating.label: Moog self-oscillation
moog_self_oscillating.procrustean_note: True self-oscillation is impossible without feedback. Faked by maximum-radius pole (r→0.999) at fc with unit-circle zeros killing everything else. Produces a near-sinusoidal peak, not true oscillation.

singers_formant.label: Singer's Formant (ring)
singers_formant.procrustean_note: Three formants packed within 500 Hz triggers Proximity Gain Law: +17dB non-linear magnification. The DF2T cascade naturally produces this — cascaded poles that close together constructively interfere. This is the honest zone.
